name: Microsoft 365

rateLimits.global: 130,000 requests per 10 seconds per app across all tenants
rateLimits.perTenant: Varies by service; user operations ~throttled at 10,000 requests per 10 minutes
rateLimits.teams: 4 requests per second per app per team
rateLimits.subscriptions: 500 write requests per 20 seconds per app per tenant

scim.notes: Microsoft Entra ID supports SCIM 2.0 provisioning via the provisioning API. The Graph API can be used alongside SCIM for enriching user data.

webhooks.notes: Microsoft Graph change notifications support webhooks, Azure Event Hubs, and Azure Event Grid as delivery methods.

sandbox.notes: Microsoft 365 Developer Program offers a free renewable E5 developer sandbox subscription with 25 user licenses for 90 days (auto-renews with dev activity). Eligibility restricted to Visual Studio subscribers and certain partner program members as of 2025.

needs_verification: Exact SCIM provisioning endpoint URL for Microsoft Entra ID (varies by app registration)
Current Microsoft 365 Developer Program eligibility criteria (policies changed in 2025)
